notes: Synthetic-future clean fixture for Todo 15's RELEASE READY exit-0 branch. This fixture does NOT fabricate real evidence; it supplies a minimal platformFixture object that scripts/render-supported-platforms.mjs validates end-to-end. The platformFixture object below is shaped so the renderer's loader accepts it AND at least one run passes the per-OS process.arch expectation. The renderer resolves logPath against the working directory; this fixture therefore runs the validator from the repo root and the file paths below point at the synthetic log blobs that ship alongside this fixture.
